backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a restaurant backend with stable storage for menu items, restaurant info, and specialties, exposing CRUD and query methods for each.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage hero, menu section, about section, contact section) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Indian Garden Chicago' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page site by rendering Navigation, Hero, Menu, About, Contact, and Footer with SectionDividers between content sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section with a restaurant ambiance image, a '40+ Years' badge overlay, narrative history text, and a four-item feature highlights grid.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section that fetches restaurant info from the backend (with fallback data), displays address, phone, hours, and email cards, and embeds a Google Maps iframe.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Deep crimson footer with restaurant branding, social media icon links, smooth-scroll quick nav links, and contact address/phone details.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Indian Garden restaurant with a background image, gradient overlay, decorative mandala elements, specialty badges fetched from the backend, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the menu and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section that fetches and displays menu items grouped by category with filterable tab buttons, a defined category order with icons, and a skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component that renders a single menu item's name, description, and price with gold corner accents and hover styling.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll links to page sections, a reserve button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/SectionDivider.t: Decorative SVG divider component featuring a center mandala, lotus petals, diamonds, and horizontal lines, with an optional horizontal flip prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useMenuItems, useRestaurantInfo, useSpecialties) that fetch data from the backend actor, each enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines an Indian Garden color palette using OKLCH CSS variables (saffron, gold, crimson, ivory), imports Playfair Display and Lato fonts, and sets up Tailwind base/component/utility layers with light and dark theme tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with the Indian Garden OKLCH color palette, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing the goal of revamping the Indian Garden Chicago restaurant website into a modern React site, listing existing features, image requirements, architectural notes, and tracked feature IDs.
